title: wdio-mocha-framework@0.3.7 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [wdio-mocha-framework](https://www.npmjs.com/package/wdio-mocha-framework) just published its new version 0.3.7.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency wdio-mocha-framework
New version 0.3.7
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As wdio-mocha-framework is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 11 commits . - [`d6c20ad`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/d6c20ad075a4545cee923e7308efd6416231d459) v0.3.7 - [`cd94caa`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/cd94caa5743691b698226962afbd6c92b97f8a7e) Revert "Context for mochaOpts.requires" - [`3cde161`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/3cde1619db460b596ad8bcf8da27657297238b4d) fixed tests - [`763f772`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/763f7723cde6201bd56296361401354051707311) v0.3.6 - [`51c5716`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/51c5716ef82336523f2a77c6e2eb65e5b79736e3) bumped borked wdio-sync version - [`ca9bbb9`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/ca9bbb91b123b17e1901abb8e079e19ed78098d3) Update contributors - [`3897a4a`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/3897a4ab1253754ac6baab2ae68830be26399304) added tests to cover webdriverio/webdriverio#1456 - [`cda8776`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/cda8776c9473992fdc73a19ae184e30895b69b2a) renamed mocha require option - [`ff40265`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/ff40265923f351d38a7d722cd436b294afda8c17) bumped wdio-sync - [`6ebb95f`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/6ebb95f2034b1b5eb871c39d62a1bb7aa19ce6bd) Merge pull request #19 from monolithed/requires - [`a1788f0`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/a1788f05917c80f1baf75eb17668a1764d91d562) Context for mochaOpts.requires See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/compare/fbbaada5cefafdd209212f46384b50c551abce59...d6c20ad075a4545cee923e7308efd6416231d459). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
